assumptions: The intragroup dividend receivable gives rise to foreign exchange exposure in the consolidated financial statements.
The question asks only which top-level IFRS hedge accounting models are relevant to documenting that foreign exchange exposure.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context identifies fair value hedge accounting as a distinct hedge accounting model for recognising gains and losses on hedged items and hedging instruments.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context expressly refers to cash flow hedges as a separate hedge accounting model, including presentation of related foreign currency effects.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context specifically names a hedge of a net investment as a distinct hedge accounting model for foreign currency exposures.
